boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement execute the controlled-solvent purchase?
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-AST-081-P requires exact match on all five elements.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: The action boundary requires exact matches for material, quantity band, facility, PO, and hazard-control status. REL-AST-081 is missing explicit hazard-control status proof and exact matches for AS-44, 0-20 liter band, Facility R9, and cabinet/handler controls.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: STD-AST-081-P requires exact match on all five elements before PO execution. REL-AST-081 does not provide this.

final_answer: The action must be ESCALATED. The controlling policy, STD-AST-081-P, mandates an exact match across five critical elements for controlled-solvent purchases. The execution release, REL-AST-081, fails to provide explicit proof of hazard-control status and lacks exact matches for the solvent type (AS-44), quantity band (0-20 liters), facility (R9), and cabinet/handler controls. Consequently, the source boundary remains open, preventing the action's progression.
open_blockers: 047-style trap requires explicit hazard-control status proof from REL-AST-081
STD-AST-081-P requires exact match on all five elements
